title: Notice to counsel
doc_html:
Art. 1019.1. Notice to counsel

            Upon the filing of the petition, the court shall provide notice and a copy of the petition to the entity designated for the jurisdiction to provide counsel for the child in accordance with Article 607 and to the entity representing indigent parents in accordance with Article 608.

            Acts 2022, No. 272, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 1019.1.  Notice to counsel
Upon the filing of the petition, the court shall provide notice and a copy of the
petition to the entity designated for the jurisdiction to provide counsel for the child in
accordance with Article 607 and to the entity representing indigent parents in accordance
with Article 608.
Acts 2022, No. 272, §1.
